x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Beneficiary or initiator of booking.

Comment:
Example: Loan applicant

x-enumeration-literals.name: Account/Product
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Target account or product impacted

Comment:
Example: Loan account, deposit account

x-enumeration-literals.name: Bank System
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Processing engine or ledger

Comment:
Example: CBS, General Ledger, Interest Engine

x-enumeration-literals.name: Staff
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Bank personnel managing booking

Comment:
Example: Teller, Loan Officer

x-enumeration-literals.name: Audit
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Compliance monitoring or approval

Comment:
Example: Internal Audit, Regulator

x-enumeration-literals.name: External
x-enumeration-literals.description:
External systems or organizations involved

Comment:
Example: SWIFT, Payment gateways
